title: CNBC Daily Open: The buyers are back ahead of SpaceX IPO
summary_full: SpaceX will start trading on the Nasdaq today after raising $75 billion in its record-breaking IPO, as Wall Street's rally resumes on Iran peace hopes.
summary_public: SpaceX will start trading on the Nasdaq today after raising $75 billion in its record-breaking IPO, as Wall Street's rally resumes on Iran peace hopes.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Wall Street's rally resumes on Iran peace hopes.
